mapper.select:
SELECT t1.*, t2.EMPID, t2.LOCAL_NAME, t3.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_EDUCATION t1 LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE t2 ON t1.PERSON_ID = t2.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT t3 ON t2.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO WHERE 1=1 AND t1.ACTIVITY = '1'
AND t2.EMPID LIKE '%' || #{empId} || '%'
AND t2.LOCAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{localName} || '%'
AND t1.INSTITUTION_NAME LIKE '%' || #{institutionName} || '%'
ORDER BY t2.EMPID ASC

SELECT t1.*, t2.EMPID, t2.LOCAL_NAME, t3.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_EDUCATION t1 LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE t2 ON t1.PERSON_ID = t2.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT t3 ON t2.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO WHERE t1.ACTIVITY = '1' AND t1.EDUC_NO = #{educNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HR_EDUCATION ( EDUC_NO, PERSON_ID, DEGREE_CODE, FINAL_DEGREE_WHETHER, DEGREES_CODE, INSTITUTION_NAME, SUBJECT, START_DATE, END_DATE, SCHOOL_LENGTH, THESIS_NAME_LOCAL, THESIS_NAME_ENG, SUBJECT_SECOND, EDU_DEG_NUM, SITE_COUNTRY, REMARK, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, PLACE, STUDY_EXPERIENCE, FILE_NAME, FILE_URL, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( HR_EDU_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{personId}, #{degreeCode}, #{finalDegreeWhether}, #{degreesCode}, #{institutionName}, #{subject}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{schoolLength}, #{thesisNameLocal}, #{thesisNameEng}, #{subjectSecond}, #{eduDegNum}, #{siteCountry}, #{remark}, #{orderNo}, #{activity}, #{place}, #{studyExperience}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, SYSDATE, #{adminID}, #{adminIP}, SYSDATE, #{adminID}, #{adminIP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE HR_EDUCATION SET PERSON_ID = #{personId}, DEGREE_CODE = #{degreeCode}, FINAL_DEGREE_WHETHER = #{finalDegreeWhether}, DEGREES_CODE = #{degreesCode}, INSTITUTION_NAME = #{institutionName}, SUBJECT = #{subject}, START_DATE = #{startDate}, END_DATE = #{endDate}, SCHOOL_LENGTH = #{schoolLength}, THESIS_NAME_LOCAL = #{thesisNameLocal}, THESIS_NAME_ENG = #{thesisNameEng}, SUBJECT_SECOND = #{subjectSecond}, EDU_DEG_NUM = #{eduDegNum}, SITE_COUNTRY = #{siteCountry}, REMARK = #{remark}, ORDERNO = #{orderNo}, ACTIVITY = #{activity}, PLACE = #{place}, STUDY_EXPERIENCE = #{studyExperience}, FILE_NAME = #{fileName}, FILE_URL = #{fileUrl}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP} WHERE EDUC_NO = #{educNo}
